message:
fix(core,vdbe,migrate): attached-schema DML delegation, interrupt-safe VDBE ops, and migration ordering guard

connection.rs:
- Add full DML delegation for INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and CREATE TABLE
  against attached schemas, with schema rewriting and change tracking
- Refactor INSERT...SELECT into materialized-row two-phase execution so
  cross-schema inserts can evaluate source on main and write to attached
- Add visit/strip helpers for UPDATE and DELETE qualified names (mirrors
  existing SELECT visitors)
- Extract shared note_attached_schema_usage + resolve_attached_schema_usage
  to deduplicate schema detection across SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE
- Guard against recreating a virtual table in the same txn after DROP
- Fix vtab savepoint rollback_to to call rollback_to before release
- Fix dropped-vtab-instance duplicate-key check ordering (check before insert)

engine.rs:
- Add cancellation checkpoints before vtab cursor ops (VFilter, VColumn,
  VNext) and aggregate/window function steps to ensure interrupt is
  observed promptly
- Extract vtab_exec_outcome helper to propagate Interrupt errors directly
  instead of wrapping them in ExecOutcome::Error
- Extend VDBE program hashing to include P4 operand payloads for correct
  prepared-statement cache discrimination

migrate.rs:
- Replace per-version existence check with monotonic version comparison
  (current_version_at_least) to skip stale migrations when the DB has
  already advanced beyond a given version
- Wrap apply_one body in a closure so rollback is reached on any inner
  error (previously only triggered on apply_one_inner failure)
- Add test for skipping outdated migrations and assert no leaked txn on
  failure

perf_runner.rs:
- Expand actionable-ranking test coverage: assert allocator_pressure
  entries, validate mapped_beads and implication fields for each cost
  component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
